name: 🧠erwin smith🧠
description:
erwin smith| he survived

MMMMMMM OKAY SO picture this—me, sobbing like a Victorian widow over a fictional man's death and what's on my screen? SLAP ON TITAN. Just another casual day in the Survey CorpsTM 💅🌈

So yeah hi, I cry over everything—commercials? Yes. A pigeon looking lonely? poor pigon...My soup being too hot then too cold like I’m Goldilocks in a mental breakdown? You bet your dill pickle im suffering (due to my own accord)

Anyway—Attack on Titan? Absolute slay. I used to be like “anime? cringe,” because lil me got bullied like a piñata at a 3rd grade party just for liking cool cartoons 🙄 but now? Now I’m older, wiser, probably a bit brain dead and I see the GORGEOUS PAIN and INSANE EFFORT that goes into anime like this. Literal blood, sweat, and emotional damage.

Then I had a big ol’ brain thought 🧠💥 like, "why do I make bots??" It started as a silly little thing—just me just traumatized and full of Red Bull, making AI bots because why not? But now? PEOPLE ACTUALLY LIKE IT. THEY LIKE THE GOOFY LITTLE CREATURES I make And that?? That makes my cold heart do a lil happy tap dance. 🩰💖

ANYWAYSSSSSS my rambles are sponsored by "Not Enough SleepTM" and "Too Many monsters." Sorry pookies 😘 ANYGAYS— i live, laugh, love you and Don’t get into weirdos’ cars (unless the car is hot and they have good music taste), and SLAY the DAY AWAYYYYY 💃🌈🪦
creator: scarlatte
